title: nf-core/gatkpopulation pipeline parameters
description: GATK and Parabricks germline variant and CNV pipeline

input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

input.help_text: Stages 0-2 use sample,fastq_1,fastq_2; stage 3 uses sample,bam,bai; stage 4 uses sample,gvcf,tbi; stage 5 uses contig,genomicsdb; and stage 6 uses contig,vcf,tbi. Input is optional only when starting and stopping at stage 0.

start_stage.help_text: 0 reference, 1 trimming, 2 BAM, 3 sample GVCF, 4 GenomicsDB, 5 raw VCF, 6 filtered VCF.

stop_stage.help_text: Defaults to stage 6 and must not be lower than --start_stage.

adapter_fasta.description: Optional FASTA file containing adapter sequences supplied to fastp.

trimmer.help_text: Use `fastp` (default) or `trimmomatic`. Exactly one trimmer is run for each pipeline execution.

trimmomatic_args.description: Ordered trimming steps passed to Trimmomatic.
trimmomatic_args.help_text: Only used when `--trimmer trimmomatic` is selected. Replace the default with any valid Trimmomatic step string, for example `ILLUMINACLIP:/absolute/path/adapters.fa:2:30:10 SLIDINGWINDOW:4:20 MINLEN:36`.

run_serial.description: Optional four-character serial used to identify a run.
run_serial.help_text: The first character must be A-Z and the remaining characters must be A-Z or 0-9. If omitted, the bundled run_pipeline.sh launcher generates an unused serial and appends it to the work and output roots. The serial is retained with `-resume`.

outdir.description: The output directory where the results will be saved. You have to use absolute paths to storage on Cloud infrastructure.

email.help_text: Set this parameter to your e-mail address to get a summary e-mail with details of the run sent to you when the workflow exits. If set in your user config file (`~/.nextflow/config`) then you don't need to specify this on the command line for every run.

multiqc_title.description: MultiQC report title. Printed as page header, used for filename if not otherwise specified.

reference_genome_options.title: Reference genome options
reference_genome_options.description: Reference genome related files and options required for the workflow.

genome.help_text:
If using a reference genome configured in the pipeline using iGenomes, use this parameter to give the ID for the reference. This is then used to build the full paths for all required reference genome files e.g. `--genome GRCh38`. 

See the [nf-core website docs](https://nf-co.re/usage/reference_genomes) for more details.

fasta.description: Path to an uncompressed reference FASTA file.
fasta.help_text: Required for stages 0 and 2-5 unless supplied by --genome. Stage 0 creates the FASTA index, sequence dictionary, and BWA index. Later entry stages use existing reference companions.

fasta_fai.description: Existing FASTA index for starts after stage 0.
fasta_fai.help_text: Defaults to <fasta>.fai. Supply it explicitly when starting at stage 6 with `--gather_vcfs 6`; the contig order is used to arrange GatherVcfs inputs.

fasta_dict.description: Existing GATK sequence dictionary for starts after stage 0.
fasta_dict.help_text: Defaults to the FASTA basename with .dict.

bwa_index.description: Optional directory containing a traditional BWA index.
bwa_index.help_text: The directory must contain the `.amb`, `.ann`, `.bwt`, `.pac`, and `.sa` files. This traditional BWA index is used by both CPU BWA-MEM and Parabricks.

known_sites.description: Known-sites VCF files used for BQSR.
known_sites.help_text: Each `.vcf.gz` file must have an adjacent `.vcf.gz.tbi` index. If omitted, both CPU and GPU branches skip BQSR.

intervals.description: Optional interval file restricting BQSR and per-sample GVCF calling.

igenomes_ignore.description: Do not load the iGenomes reference config.
igenomes_ignore.help_text: Do not load `igenomes.config` when running the pipeline. You may choose this option if you observe clashes between custom parameters and those supplied in `igenomes.config`.

igenomes_base.description: The base path to the igenomes reference files

preprocessing_options.title: Read preprocessing options
preprocessing_options.description: CPU preprocessing by default, or NVIDIA Parabricks when the `gpu` profile is selected with Docker, Singularity, or Apptainer.

sequencing_type.description: Input sequencing design controlling duplicate marking.
sequencing_type.help_text: `wgs` and `wes` run MarkDuplicates. `rad` covers RAD-seq, GBS, and ddRAD; `amp` covers amplicon sequencing. The representative-sequencing modes skip CPU MarkDuplicates, add Parabricks fq2bam `--no-markdups`, and omit `_MD` from final BAM names.

wes.description: Convenience alias for `--sequencing_type wes`; duplicate marking remains enabled.

rad.description: Convenience alias for `--sequencing_type rad`; duplicate marking is disabled.
rad.help_text: Use for RAD-seq, GBS, ddRAD, and related reduced-representation libraries.

amp.description: Convenience alias for `--sequencing_type amp`; duplicate marking is disabled.
amp.help_text: Use for amplicon sequencing libraries in which duplicate removal is inappropriate.

gpu_fallback.description: Rerun unsuccessful GPU samples with the CPU workflow.

gpu_count.description: Number of GPUs requested by each Parabricks task.
gpu_count.help_text: Defaults to 4. This controls the Slurm `--gres=gpu:N` request, Nextflow accelerator value, and Parabricks `--num-gpus`.

gpu_max_submit_await.description: Maximum time a GPU task may remain queued before CPU fallback.

parabricks_sif.help_text: Used only with the `singularity` or `apptainer` profile. Docker GPU runs use the NVIDIA Parabricks image.

all_sites.description: Include loci found to be non-variant after joint genotyping.
all_sites.help_text: Regular variant-only VCFs are generated by default. With `--all_sites`, GATK4 GenotypeGVCFs adds `--include-non-variant-sites true`. Joint genotyping after GenomicsDBImport always uses CPU GATK, including under the GPU profile.

subset_samples.description: Optional one-column CSV listing samples to joint genotype.
subset_samples.help_text: The CSV must have the header `sample` and one GenomicsDB sample name per row. When supplied for stage 5, SelectVariants writes a subset GVCF for each contig under 05.1-subset before GenotypeGVCFs. The GenomicsDB is read-only and is not modified.

gather_vcfs.description: Optionally gather per-contig VCFs into one genome-wide VCF after stage 5 or stage 6.
gather_vcfs.help_text: Use `--gather_vcfs 5` to create 05-raw_vcf/all.raw.vcf.gz and filter only that gathered VCF at stage 6. Use `--gather_vcfs 6` to filter each contig first and then create 06-filtered_vcf/all.filtered.vcf.gz. Omit this option to retain per-contig processing only.

filter_vcf.help_text: `biallele` retains biallelic SNPs with F_MISSING < 0.1, QUAL >= 30, and INFO/DP > 3. `monobi` retains monomorphic reference sites plus biallelic SNPs, applies QUAL >= 30 only to SNPs, removes indels, and applies the same missingness and depth thresholds. Use `monobi` with `--all_sites` unless the stage-6 input already contains monomorphic records.

bcftools_view_args.description: Arguments passed to bcftools view for per-contig VCF filtering.
bcftools_view_args.help_text: Advanced override for `--filter_vcf`. The pipeline appends `--output-type z --write-index=tbi` to guarantee compressed, indexed VCF output. Supply any compatible bcftools view filtering or subsetting options here; omit output-type and write-index options. Set this to an empty string to retain all records while still producing a compressed indexed copy.

institutional_config_options.title: Institutional config options
institutional_config_options.description: Parameters used to describe centralised config profiles. These should not be edited.
institutional_config_options.help_text: The centralised nf-core configuration profiles use a handful of pipeline parameters to describe themselves. This information is then printed to the Nextflow log when you run a pipeline. You should not need to change these values when you run a pipeline.

custom_config_version.description: Git commit id for Institutional configs.

custom_config_base.help_text: If you're running offline, Nextflow will not be able to fetch the institutional config files from the internet. If you don't need them, then this is not a problem. If you do need them, you should download the files from the repo and tell Nextflow where to find them with this parameter.

slurm_options.title: Slurm options
slurm_options.description: Optional settings for the built-in Slurm executor profile.

slurm_qos.description: Slurm quality of service supplied through --qos.

slurm_queue_size.description: Maximum number of tasks Nextflow may keep in the Slurm queue.

grid_executor_options.title: SGE, UGE, and PBS options
grid_executor_options.description: Optional settings for the built-in SGE, UGE, PBS/Torque, and PBS Pro executor profiles.

sge_penv.description: SGE parallel environment used for multi-CPU tasks, for example smp.

sge_cluster_options.description: Additional qsub options applied to every SGE task.

sge_gpu_cluster_options.description: Site-specific SGE qsub resource options added only to GPU tasks.
sge_gpu_cluster_options.help_text: GPU resource-complex names vary by cluster. Use `{gpu_count}` as a placeholder, for example `-l gpu={gpu_count}`.

sge_queue_size.description: Maximum number of tasks Nextflow may keep in the SGE queue.

uge_penv.description: UGE parallel environment used for multi-CPU tasks, for example smp.

uge_cluster_options.description: Additional qsub options applied to every UGE task.

uge_gpu_cluster_options.description: Site-specific UGE qsub resource options added only to GPU tasks.
uge_gpu_cluster_options.help_text: GPU resource-complex names vary by cluster. Use `{gpu_count}` as a placeholder, for example `-l gpu={gpu_count}`.

uge_queue_size.description: Maximum number of tasks Nextflow may keep in the UGE queue.

pbs_cluster_options.description: Additional qsub options applied to every PBS/Torque task.

pbs_gpu_cluster_options.description: Site-specific PBS/Torque qsub resource options added only to GPU tasks.
pbs_gpu_cluster_options.help_text: Use `{gpu_count}` as a placeholder for the value of `--gpu_count`.

pbs_queue_size.description: Maximum number of tasks Nextflow may keep in the PBS/Torque queue.

pbspro_queue.description: PBS Pro queue supplied to qsub.

pbspro_cluster_options.description: Additional qsub options applied to every PBS Pro task.

pbspro_gpu_cluster_options.description: Site-specific PBS Pro qsub resource options added only to GPU tasks.
pbspro_gpu_cluster_options.help_text: Use `{gpu_count}` as a placeholder for the value of `--gpu_count`.

pbspro_queue_size.description: Maximum number of tasks Nextflow may keep in the PBS Pro queue.

generic_options.title: Generic options
generic_options.description: Less common options for the pipeline, typically set in a config file.
generic_options.help_text:
These options are common to all nf-core pipelines and allow you to customise some of the core preferences for how the pipeline runs.

Typically these options would be set in a Nextflow config file loaded for all pipeline runs, such as `~/.nextflow/config`.

publish_dir_mode.description: Method used to save pipeline results to output directory.
publish_dir_mode.help_text: The Nextflow `publishDir` option specifies which intermediate files should be saved to the output directory. This option tells the pipeline what method should be used to move these files. See [Nextflow docs](https://www.nextflow.io/docs/latest/process.html#publishdir) for details.

email_on_fail.description: Email address for completion summary, only when pipeline fails.
email_on_fail.help_text: An email address to send a summary email to when the pipeline is completed - ONLY sent if the pipeline does not exit successfully.

plaintext_email.description: Send plain-text email instead of HTML.

max_multiqc_email_size.description: File size limit when attaching MultiQC reports to summary emails.

monochrome_logs.description: Do not use coloured log outputs.

multiqc_config.description: Custom config file to supply to MultiQC.

multiqc_logo.description: Custom logo file to supply to MultiQC. File name must also be set in the MultiQC config file

multiqc_methods_description.description: Custom MultiQC yaml file containing HTML including a methods description.

validate_params.description: Boolean whether to validate parameters against the schema at runtime

pipelines_testdata_base_path.description: Base URL or local path to location of pipeline test dataset files

trace_report_suffix.description: Suffix to add to the trace report filename. Default is the date and time in the format yyyy-MM-dd_HH-mm-ss.

help_full.description: Display the full detailed help message.

show_hidden.description: Display hidden parameters in the help message (only works when --help or --help_full are provided).
